name: pi-work-guard
description: Memory-safe workflow guard for Pi: phase budgets, checkpoints, command risk warnings, and file-size checks.

scripts.coverage: c8 --all --include=extensions/**/*.ts --include=src/**/*.ts --reporter=text --reporter=json-summary --reporter=lcov --reports-dir=coverage npm run test:unit && node scripts/verify-coverage.mjs
scripts.test: npm run typecheck && npm run test:unit && npm run check:file-size && npm run verify:release && npm run benchmark:verify
